analysis:
| Brand               | Location               | Eligible Staff       | Incentive Type | Incentive Description                                                                                   | SKUs/Products                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|---------------------|------------------------|----------------------|----------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Acqua Di Parma      | All terminals          | Shilla payroll       | Cash           | Receive $2.50–$10 cash per bottle sold (varies by SKU; e.g., $2.50 for 50ml EDCs, $10 for 180ml EDPs). | All listed SKUs (e.g., COLONIAPURAEDC50ml, SIG.SANDALOEDP180ML, IBMARANCIADICAPRIEDT180ML).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Burberry            | Fragrance counters     | GS BA                | Voucher        | $10 voucher for every 2 focus SKUs sold.                                                               | Makeup SKUs (e.g., BURBERRYMAKEBVOLUMEMASCARA01BLACK, BURBERRYMAKEKMLS24NEWLENUDELE24).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Cartier             | All terminals          | Shilla payroll only  | Cash           | $5 cash per bottle of perfume sold.                                                                    | All Cartier perfumes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Chloe               | TWING & Arrival        | GS BA                | Voucher        | $30 voucher for every $1,500 in sales.                                                                 | All Chloe products (inferred).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Diptyque            | All stores             | BAGs                 | Cash           | $5 cash per item sold when 10 SKUs are sold.                                                           | Diffusers, candles, sets (e.g., DIPTYQUEPFMDiffuserRoses, DIPTYQUEPFMNEWHOURGLASS2.0BAIES).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Drunk Elephant      | Terminals 1–3          | Shiseido Group BAs   | Voucher        | $10 voucher per $600 sales or per 5 sets of Lippe Balm Reform 3.7g sold.                               | Lippe Balm Reform 3.7g sets.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Gucci Cosmetics     | Fragrance counters     | GS BA                | Voucher        | $10 voucher for every 2 focus SKUs sold.                                                               | GUCCICOSMAKEEYEPLLE244FESTIGLOW, GUCCICOSMAKEMATTELS505JANETRUST.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Hermes (T1–T3)      | Terminals 1–3          | GS BA                | Voucher        | $15 voucher per 3 Xmas sets sold (capped at $120).                                                     | Xmas sets (unspecified).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Hermes (T1–T3)      | Terminals 1–3          | GS BA                | Product        | 1 tester per 10 Xmas sets sold.                                                                        | Xmas sets (unspecified).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Hermes (T4)         | Terminal 4             | GS BA                | Voucher        | $50 voucher per 10pc of 85ml/100ml fragrances sold (capped at $100).                                   | 85ml/100ml fragrances (unspecified).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Hermes Beauty       | All terminals          | GS BA                | Voucher        | $30 voucher per 6 Eye/Lip products sold (capped at $120).                                              | Eye pencils, lip pencils, eyeliners.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Kylie Cosmetics     | TWING & Arrival        | GS BA                | Voucher        | $10 voucher per 3 bottles sold.                                                                        | Kylie Cosmic Fragrance (unspecified).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Lancaster           | All stores             | Shilla payroll       | Voucher        | $10 voucher per 4 SKUs sold.                                                                           | Sun care products (e.g., LANCASTESKINSRDAAGESPF30100ML, LANCASTESKINSUNPROTESPF5030ML).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Nars                | All terminals          | GS BA                | Voucher        | Tiered vouchers: $10 for $1,000 sales, $50 for $3,000, $80 for $5,000.                                 | All Nars products (unspecified).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Multibrand Fragrance| Fragrance counters     | GS BA                | Voucher        | $10 voucher per focus SKU sold.                                                                        | CK One, Chloe Nomade, Davidoff Cool Water, Gucci Flora, Marc Jacobs Daisy.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |

---

1. **Top 3 most attractive incentives**:  
   - **Acqua Di Parma’s cash incentives** (up to $10 per bottle) offer immediate, high-value rewards for volume sales.  
   - **Hermes Terminal 4’s $50 voucher per 10 high-margin fragrances** provides a lucrative payout with a reasonable cap.  
   - **Diptyque’s $5 cash per item** (when selling 10 SKUs) combines volume-driven earnings with straightforward targets.  

2. **Top 3 strategies to compete**:  
   - **Introduce tiered cash incentives** for LVMH hero products (e.g., $15 cash for every Louis Vuitton fragrance sold, scaling with units).  
   - **Bundle vouchers with exclusive product testers** (e.g., $20 voucher + a Dior tester for every $1,000 sold) to add perceived value.  
   - **Simplify incentive structures** (e.g., flat $8 cash per bottle across all SKUs) to eliminate confusion and drive focus on high-margin items.  

3. **Ensuring staff adoption**:  
   - Use visual comparison charts to show LVMH incentives outperform competitors (e.g., higher per-unit payouts than Acqua Di Parma).  
   - Provide real-time tracking tools for staff to monitor earnings, emphasizing instant payouts over vouchers with caps.  
   - Train staff to position LVMH incentives as “guaranteed rewards” (cash vs. conditional vouchers) to build trust and motivation.
